title: Mandala Crafts Lime Green Raffia Yarn for Gift Wrapping – 200 Yards Natural Paper Straw Raffia Ribbon for Crochet, Crafts, Decoration, Gift Wrapping, and DIY Projects
features: Natural Raffia Ribbon: Made from natural raffia grass, the sturdy and pliable rafia straw ribbons are non-toxic, odorless, recyclable, & biodegradable, serving as great paper strings for gift wrapping, raffia Christmas wrapping ribbon, & paper craft ribbon.

Paper Raffia Ribbon for Crafts, Crochet, Scrapbook, Floral Arrangement, & Basket Weaving Supplies: The lime green paper twine ribbon serves as great raffia yarn for crocheting bags & making wreaths, raffia garlands, scarecrows, costumes, ornaments.

Raffia Twine for Gift Wrapping & Decoration: The gift wrapping twine adds an elegant touch to vases, bottles, mason jars, gift bag & basket filler, and gift tags. The rustic ribbon also dresses up homemade candles, soaps, & baked goods for business packing.

Easy to Use Twisted Paper Rope: Easy to cut and tie, the paper raffia yarn holds shape well and provides a sturdy hold for securing plants, bouquets, balloon, & florist arrangement, and decorating birthdays, holidays, Halloween, and Christmas.

Bulk Twine Wrapping Paper Ribbon Roll: The 200-yard, 1/16-inch wide twisted raffia yarn skein is continuous & non-waxed. When fully unfolded, the matte raffia paper yarn measures 3cm (1.2”) wide. The not vacuum-packed rafia string is kink-free & easy to dispense.
description: Did your vacuum packaged raffia weaving ribbon all wrinkled up? Is your straw hay string too coarse that it hurts fingers? Not all raffia for crafts is created equally. This pack of paper twisted ribbon in subdued colors is the answer. Meticulously wrapped into a spool, the colored raffia ribbon roll is easy to dispense and free of crease. The bohemian raffia natural ribbon adds an organic touch to anything it touches. Softer than hay straw, the fray resistant and colorfast natural raffia paper ribbon is soft to the touch, lays flat, maintains shape well and easy to tie knots. With plenty packing length, the fake straw ribbon roll will last through several projects. The raffia string ribbon for gift wrapping adds an elegant touch to presents and raffia bows without overshadowing them. The is ideal for braiding, weaving, macrame, and basket making. This natural raffia straw ribbon is perfect for creating Hawaiian leis, fake vines, ghillie suits, friendship bracelets, napkin rings, hula skirts, pot holders, hats, and bags. For businesses, the paper twine string enhances merchandise presentation for wrapping art prints, jams, mason jars, vases, and wine bottles. The decorative straw ribbon is a must-have for events and holidays like Christmas, Thanksgiving, Halloween, graduations, showers, weddings, and birthdays. The raffia natural string is perfect for holiday crafts, making easter nest, decorating Christmas trees, wedding favors, invitations, and wedding cakes. The raffia rope is also handy around the house for tying up flowers or tomatoes, wrapping plants, staking orchids, tying baking labels, stringing banners, repairing wicker chairs, and decorating tiki bars, farms, and headboards. The versatile raffia crafting ribbon can even be used to make cat toys.
